flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Northeast State Community College are 10% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.6k vs $38.5k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Northeast State Community College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.1k → $6.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northeast State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.8% → 0.0%).
